about_meta_title: About Me | DJ Vrana - Ivan Vraneša
about_meta_desc: Meet DJ Vrana. Over 5 years of experience in creating unforgettable atmospheres at weddings, birthdays, and corporate events with a professional approach.
about_meta_keywords: DJ Vrana about me, Ivan Vraneša DJ, wedding DJ experience, professional DJ biography
about_header_desc: Passion for rhythm, experience behind the decks, and dedication to the details that make your event flawless.
about_img_alt_logo: DJ Vrana logo - Ivan Vraneša, professional event DJ
about_story_desc: For over 5 years, I've been creating unforgettable musical atmospheres that move emotions and bring people together. With every performance, I strive to make every moment special, whether it's a first dance, a birthday celebration, or a club event.
about_card_1_desc: My love for music started in elementary school. I experimented with mixing various genres, watched DJs online, and taught myself. From my first mixes in small clubs to huge events with a thousand people, every performance was a lesson and a step forward.
about_card_1_img_alt: DJ Vrana mixing music at the beginning of his career
about_card_2_desc: What sets me apart is my ability to quickly read the crowd and adapt to the moment. I don't just play music – I create an experience that mixes emotions and the uniqueness of the moment, leaving a lasting impression on everyone present.
about_card_2_img_alt: Professional DJ equipment and headphones at a gig
about_card_3_desc: With years of experience comes the understanding that every event has its own story. I use the latest professional equipment and meticulously plan every set to ensure energy at the highest level.
about_card_3_img_alt: DJ Vrana playing music and entertaining the crowd at a night event
about_philosophy_img_alt: DJ Vrana in action at a wedding - creating the perfect atmosphere
about_philosophy_text_1: I believe that music is not just sound, but an experience that connects people. My approach is based on listening, adapting, and creating moments to remember. I treat every event as a unique story, where the goal is more than just a mix – creating emotions and an atmosphere that will be remembered.
about_philosophy_text_2: For me, it's not just another date on the calendar – every event is a story I want to tell. Through music, I create moments, emotions, and memories that stay with you long after the last dance.
about_philosophy_quote: "Music isn't just sound - it's emotion, energy, and the connection between people. My job is to create moments that are remembered forever."
about_spec_desc: Every event carries its own story, energy, and audience. Through experience, I have developed the ability to recognize what the audience wants at the right moment and create a memorable atmosphere.
about_spec_1_desc: Whether it's an intimate or grand wedding, I know how to create the right vibe and keep the dance floor full all night. I tailor the music to your wishes, the pace of the evening, and the guests so that every moment is special and unforgettable.
about_spec_2_desc: Celebrating your special day deserves music that moves, energy that's infectious, and an atmosphere that stays in your memory. Whether it's a smaller gathering or a massive party, I turn every birthday into an event people will talk about for days.
about_spec_3_desc: This is the night you've been waiting for – the end of one chapter and the beginning of new adventures. With music, I create an energy that connects everyone present, from the first to the last dance, ensuring that laughter, dancing, and good vibes are remembered long after the lights go out.
about_spec_4_desc: Corporate events are an opportunity to connect and unwind from work. I approach every event with the goal of making the music and atmosphere foster teamwork, good vibes, and unforgettable moments for the entire team.
about_cta_desc: Secure your date and make your event unforgettable. Contact me today and let's start creating the perfect atmosphere together!

weddings_hero_desc: A professional wedding DJ who creates a premium atmosphere, a packed dance floor, and unforgettable moments throughout the entire evening.
weddings_intro_text_1: As a wedding DJ, I provide professionally selected music and the perfect atmosphere that accompanies every moment of your celebration. My goal is to create an ambiance fully tailored to your wishes and wedding style.
weddings_intro_text_2: From an elegant ceremony to the last dance, every detail is carefully planned so that you and your guests can carefree enjoy unforgettable moments.

weddings_features_title: What the Wedding DJ service includes
weddings_feature_1_desc: I completely tailor the music to your wishes, taking into account the style of the wedding and the preferences of you and your guests.
weddings_feature_2_desc: Not only do I read the crowd's energy and pick the right songs at the right time, but I also guide the flow of the evening – from the ceremony to the last dance – ensuring everything runs smoothly and stress-free.
weddings_feature_3_desc: I use high-quality, reliable audio equipment that covers the entire venue, from an intimate ceremony to a high-energy evening party. Every moment of your celebration will be experienced with crystal-clear sound.
weddings_feature_4_desc: Lighting that highlights every moment and transforms your wedding venue into a magical stage for your special day.
weddings_feature_5_desc: We go through all the details, special requests, and key moments together to ensure everything goes off without a hitch.
weddings_feature_6_desc: Experience working at weddings gives me a feel for the crowd and rhythm, creating the perfect atmosphere and unforgettable moments.
weddings_details_title: A rhythm that keeps the dance floor packed
weddings_details_text_1: The secret to a great wedding party lies in skillfully reading the crowd. Through dynamic and seamless transitions between musical genres, I ensure that younger and older generations of your guests enjoy the dance floor together.
weddings_details_text_2: With crystal-clear sound and modern lighting that visually follows the atmosphere, I turn any space into an exclusive stage. Your only job is to surrender to the fun, while I take care of the energy that lasts until the early morning hours.
weddings_details_img_alt: Professional wedding DJ - DJ Vrana creates a romantic and fun atmosphere for newlyweds
weddings_cta_desc: Ready for an unforgettable wedding with premium music? Contact me and together we will create an atmosphere you will remember for a lifetime.
weddings_cta_aria: Send an inquiry and book a DJ for your wedding

equipment_rental_intro_text_1: Whether you are organizing a private party, corporate event, or a larger performance, I provide equipment that guarantees a premium experience. Reliable, high-class professional equipment that delivers powerful and crystal-clear sound in any space.

dj_education_meta_title: DJ School & Education | Mixing Course | DJ Vrana
dj_education_meta_desc: Learn the basics and advanced skills of DJing. Practical workshops, beatmatching, equipment familiarization, and mentoring to build your DJ career.
dj_education_meta_keywords: DJ education, DJ school, DJ course, how to become a DJ, music mixing lessons, learning DJ equipment
dj_education_schema_desc: Practical DJ course covering equipment basics, mixing techniques, beatmatching, and mentoring for live performances.
dj_education_hero_desc: Learn the basics and advanced skills of DJing. Workshops are practical, fun, and tailored to all levels – from beginners to those who want to perfect their mixing.
dj_education_video_fallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.
dj_education_intro_title: Achieve your potential behind the DJ booth
dj_education_intro_text_1: Through an individual approach and a personalized program, I focus on your progress – whether you are just getting familiar with the equipment or already preparing for your first gigs.
dj_education_intro_text_2: Practical exercises and live mix sessions help you master mixing techniques, beatmatching, and using the latest digital DJ software, preparing you for solo performances and playing in front of an audience.
dj_education_feature_1_title: Getting to know equipment and software
dj_education_feature_1_desc: DJ equipment basics – controllers, CDJs, mixers – and the most popular digital software like rekordBox and Serato. I teach you how to connect everything and use it correctly.
dj_education_feature_2_desc: Learning basic and advanced mixing techniques, including beatmatching and rhythm alignment for smooth transitions between songs.
dj_education_feature_3_desc: I teach you how to properly select music and build sets according to energy, genre, and the flow of the evening, creating a logical and dynamic musical journey from start to finish.
dj_education_feature_4_title: Learning about atmosphere and crowd energy
dj_education_feature_4_desc: How to track crowd reactions and adapt the music according to the energy, making every performance dynamic and interesting.
dj_education_feature_5_desc: Preparation for your first gigs, developing confidence behind the booth, and advice on building your own DJ identity and finding gig opportunities.
dj_education_feature_6_desc: Every student is different, so I adapt the program to your knowledge, pace, and goals to make progress as efficient and natural as possible.
dj_education_details_img_alt: Practical DJ education and learning to use professional DJ controllers
dj_education_details_title: More than technique: The art of reading the crowd
dj_education_details_text_1: Technical skills are the foundation, but the real secret to a successful performance lies in managing the energy in the room. I will teach you how to recognize the crowd's mood, when to change the rhythm, and how to properly build a set that keeps people on the dance floor.
dj_education_details_text_2: We also go through the key steps of 'behind the scenes' preparation – from advanced music library organization to handling unpredictable situations at a gig. You will get concrete firsthand advice that will help you build confidence and your own recognizable style.
dj_education_cta_desc: Ready to step behind the booth and master the art of mixing? Apply for education and book your first session.
dj_education_cta_aria: Send an inquiry and apply for DJ education

contact_meta_desc: Book DJ Vrana for your destination wedding, birthday, or corporate event in Croatia. Check availability, pricing, and read FAQs. Available in Zagreb, Split, Dubrovnik & beyond.
contact_meta_keywords: DJ Vrana contact, destination wedding DJ Croatia, wedding DJ prices, DJ hire Zagreb, book a DJ Croatia
contact_header_subtitle: Get in touch and let's create unforgettable energy and memories together.
contact_form_desc: Fill out the form and I will get back to you as soon as possible
contact_form_placeholder_message: Ask a question, describe your event, location, number of guests...
contact_form_success_msg: Thank you! Your message has been successfully sent. We will contact you shortly.
contact_form_error_msg: An error occurred while sending. Please try again or contact us directly via email.
contact_faq_desc: Everything you need to know about DJ services for weddings, parties, and corporate events.
contact_faq_1_q: What makes you stand out from other DJs?
contact_faq_1_a: DJ Vrana creates a unique atmosphere at your event. Through experience, carefully reading the crowd, and mixing various music genres, I take you on an unforgettable musical journey – whether it's a wedding, birthday, or celebration.
contact_faq_2_a: I offer professional DJ services for weddings, corporate events, and private parties, as well as DJ education and DJ equipment rental.
contact_faq_3_q: Do you offer DJ + Saxophone or DJ + Violin packages?
contact_faq_3_a:
Yes, I offer combinations of DJ with live musicians. The most popular choice is DJ + Saxophone for an energetic party vibe, while the violin is a perfect addition for the ceremony and cocktail reception.

I tailor each package to your schedule, venue, and desired atmosphere to create a unique experience together.
contact_faq_4_q: Do you perform outside of Zagreb?
contact_faq_4_a: Yes! DJ Vrana performs all across Croatia – from Zagreb and its surroundings, to Split, Dalmatia, Rijeka, Istria, Slavonia, and Dubrovnik.
contact_faq_5_a: Yes, DJ Vrana holds a valid ZAMP license and all performances are compliant with copyright laws, so your event is completely legal and worry-free.
contact_faq_6_q: How do we arrange the wedding playlist?
contact_faq_6_a: We arrange the playlist for your wedding together during a meeting prior to the event. You can send a list of favorite songs, special requests, and do-not-play songs, and DJ Vrana blends them with his expertise to create the perfect musical atmosphere throughout the entire event.
contact_faq_7_q: How can I book DJ Vrana?
contact_faq_7_a:
Contact me by phone (+385 98 958 2676) or via the contact form. We will arrange a free consultation to discuss your wishes, music preferences, and all event details.

Fill out the form here
tac_meta_desc: Read the terms and conditions of using the DJ Vrana website. Information about bookings, copyrights, and limitations of liability.
tac_schema_desc: Terms and conditions for using the services and website of DJ Vrana.
tac_sec1_p1_end: (hereinafter: “Site”). By using the Site, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms of Use.
tac_sec1_p2: If you do not agree with these Terms of Use, please do not use the Site and do not send inquiries via the contact form.
tac_sec2_p1: The Site is of a promotional (informational) nature and serves exclusively to display DJ services, availability, and enable sending inquiries/booking dates via the contact form.
tac_sec2_p2: Ordering and payment of services do not take place via the Site. Any subsequent agreement on the provision of services (including price, conditions, and obligations) is conducted via e-mail communication.
tac_sec3_p1: The DJ service is provided by Ivan Vraneša (freelance artist) as a natural person.
tac_sec4_p1: Sending an inquiry or reservation via the contact form does not obligate the user to contract the service, nor does it represent automatic acceptance of the service on our part.
tac_sec4_p2: An offer, if applicable, is delivered via e-mail and may contain a validity period, price, terms, and additional information. The service is considered agreed upon only after explicit confirmation of the agreement between the parties via e-mail (or another agreed channel).
tac_sec5_p1: The user is responsible for the accuracy and completeness of the data entered into the contact form (e.g., name, e-mail, event date, phone number, message).
tac_sec5_p2: We are not liable for any damage or missed communication resulting from incorrectly entered data (e.g., wrong e-mail address).
tac_sec6_li1: Send illegal, offensive, threatening, or misleading content via the contact form.
tac_sec6_li2: Attempt to disrupt the operation of the Site, servers, or security mechanisms (e.g., scripts, spam, unauthorized access attempts).
tac_sec6_li3: Use the Site in a manner that may damage the reputation of the service provider or third parties.
tac_sec6_warn_bold: we reserve the right to ignore inquiries
tac_sec6_warn_end: , block communication, and take appropriate steps for protection.
tac_sec7_p1: All content on the Site (texts, photographs, logos, design, video materials, music clips if any) is protected by copyright and/or other intellectual property rights unless explicitly stated otherwise.
tac_sec7_p2: Without prior written permission, it is not permitted to copy, distribute, publicly display, or process the Site's content for commercial purposes.
tac_sec8_p1: The Site may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., social networks) or use third-party services (e.g., analytics tools with consent).
tac_sec8_p2: We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or practices of third parties. Using such links/services is at your own risk.
tac_sec9_p1: We strive to ensure continuous availability of the Site, but we do not guarantee that the Site will always operate without interruptions or errors (e.g., due to maintenance, breakdowns, upgrades, hosting issues).
tac_sec9_p2: We reserve the right at any time to modify, temporarily disable, or permanently remove part or all of the Site without prior notice.
tac_sec10_p1: Information on the Site is provided “as is” and serves general information purposes. We do not guarantee that all information is complete or up-to-date at all times (e.g., date availability).
tac_sec10_p2: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for:
tac_sec10_li1: Direct or indirect damage resulting from the use of the Site or the inability to use the Site.
tac_sec10_li2: Loss of data or business damages.
tac_sec10_li3: The conduct of third parties (e.g., external links).
tac_sec11_p1: The processing of personal data (e.g., data from the contact form) and the use of cookies and analytics (e.g., Google Analytics with consent) are governed by a separate document: the Privacy Policy.
tac_sec11_p2_start: We recommend that you read the
tac_sec12_p1: These Terms of Use are governed by the law of the Republic of Croatia.
tac_sec12_p2: In the event of a dispute, the parties will try to resolve the dispute amicably. If an amicable resolution is not possible, the court of actual jurisdiction according to the service provider's location shall be competent, unless mandatory regulations dictate otherwise.
tac_sec13_title: 13. Changes to the Terms of Use
tac_sec13_p1: We reserve the right to amend these Terms of Use to align them with changes in business operations, Site functionalities, or legal regulations.
tac_sec13_p2: The updated version will be published on the Site and takes effect on the day of publication.
tac_contact_desc: If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, please contact us:
pp_meta_desc: Read how DJ Vrana collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
pp_schema_desc: Information on personal data protection and GDPR compliance for DJ Vrana's clients.
pp_sec1_p1: Welcome to our Privacy Policy. Protecting your personal data is our priority and an obligation we take extremely seriously. This document explains in detail how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and all applicable Croatian laws.
pp_sec1_p2: This policy applies to all services we provide, including bookings, consultations, performances at events, and all communication via our website and other channels.
pp_sec2_p1: The controller of personal data is Ivan Vraneša (freelance artist).
pp_sec2_p4: Services are provided as a natural person, and this website serves exclusively for informative inquiries. For all questions, requests, or concerns regarding the processing of your personal data, you can contact me at the stated e-mail.
pp_sec2_warn_text: The right to privacy is not just a legal obligation – it is the foundation of trust between me and my clients.
pp_sec3_desc: In order to provide you with premium service and a professional experience, we collect the following categories of personal data:
pp_sec3_1_title: 3.1 Data we collect via the contact form
pp_sec3_2_title: 3.2 Data we collect subsequently (during e-mail communication)
pp_sec3_2_li3: Number of guests and other details necessary only if you choose our service
pp_sec4_desc: We use your personal data exclusively for the following purposes:
pp_sec4_li1_text: Drafting and sending non-binding offers based on your inquiry via the contact form.
pp_sec4_li2_text: Answering questions and arranging details related to the event.
pp_sec4_li3_text: Preparation and execution of DJ services according to the agreement.
pp_sec5_desc: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
pp_sec5_li1_text: Processing is necessary so that we can communicate about the conditions and possibility of providing the service at your request.
pp_sec5_li2_text: Protection of rights and resolving potential complaints.
pp_sec5_li3_text: Processing data about your behavior on the site via analytical cookies (Google Analytics) is done exclusively if you give us your explicit consent via the cookie banner.
pp_sec6_desc: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. Data may be shared only in the following situations:
pp_sec6_li1: With legal and state authorities exclusively when there is a strict legal obligation.
pp_sec6_li2: With IT and analytics service providers who technically enable our website to operate and analyze visits (e.g., hosting company and Google Ireland Limited for Google Analytics, exclusively if you have given consent for it).
pp_sec6_italic: All our partners are subject to strict contractual obligations regarding data protection and may not use it for their own purposes.
pp_sec7_desc: The security of your data is crucial to us. We have implemented state-of-the-art technical and organizational protection measures:
pp_sec7_li1: Use of SSL/TLS encryption for all communication on the website
pp_sec7_warn_text: I keep your personal data from informative inquiries only as long as our communication lasts. If an agreement on the service is not reached, your data from the inquiry is deleted within 6 months. If an agreement is made, the data is kept until the service is performed and the deadline for potential complaints expires.
pp_sec8_desc: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
pp_sec8_li1_text: You can request confirmation of whether your data is being processed.
pp_sec8_li2_text: You can request the correction of inaccurate data.
pp_sec8_li3_bold: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"):
pp_sec8_li3_text: You can request the deletion of data under certain conditions.
pp_sec8_li4_text: In certain situations, you can request to pause processing.
pp_sec8_li5_text: You can object to data processing.
pp_sec8_li6_bold: Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority:
pp_sec8_li6_text: If you believe that the processing of your personal data violates the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Personal Data Protection Agency (AZOP), Selska cesta 136, 10000 Zagreb, web: azop.hr.
pp_sec8_footer: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us via the contact information below. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
pp_sec9_desc: Our website uses cookies to improve your user experience and enable the site to function properly. Cookies are small text files stored on your device.
pp_sec9_li2_text: Help us understand how visitors use the site. These cookies are not set automatically. They are loaded onto your device only if you give your consent by clicking the 'Accept' button on our cookie banner. You can withdraw your consent at any time.
pp_sec9_footer: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the site.
pp_sec10_p1: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in our practices, technology, or legal requirements. We will notify you of any significant changes via e-mail or a notice on the website.
pp_sec10_p2: We recommend that you periodically review this page to stay informed about how we protect your data.
pp_sec11_desc: Our services are not intended for persons under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If we learn that we have collected data from a minor without parental consent, we will take steps to delete that data.
pp_contact_desc: For any questions, requests, or concerns regarding the processing of your personal data, feel free to contact us:
